description: aninditabasu.github.io hosts Anindita Basu's personal site and the Indica project, a curated dataset and documentation site about ancient Indian texts and subjects. The Indica project exposes machine-readable APIs for Rig Veda metadata, Vedic noun meanings, and Mahabharat knowledge-graph data.
summary: Public HTTP APIs only: three open Indica REST APIs (Rig Veda, Vedic Society, and Mahabharat), each documented with an OpenAPI spec and requiring no authentication.
